disclosure: The 'most owners score high on acquisition, low on conversion' line reflects a general pattern the Black Arrow team observes across client engagements, not a formal study or universal statistic.

claims.text: Black Arrow's method is built on four systems: Acquisition, Conversion, Operations, Retention
Most owners score high on acquisition and low on conversion
The lowest-scoring system determines where revenue leaks first
Black Arrow runs a free assessment across the four systems in under a minute
